# Tokamak Network

> Tokamak Network is an Ethereum-native Layer 2 platform that enables on-demand rollup deployment. Built on the OP Stack, it allows any application to launch its own optimized L2 chain in minutes. The native token TON powers seigniorage staking, DAO governance, and cross-chain bridging across the ecosystem.

Tokamak Network's core product, Thanos, provides modular rollup infrastructure with custom chain configuration, one-click deployment, and an open plug-and-extend architecture. The protocol features seigniorage-based staking where TON holders earn rewards while securing the network, and a DAO governance system for protocol decisions.

TON token contract: 0x2be5e8c109e2197D077D13A82dAead6a9b3433C5 (Ethereum Mainnet)

## Core Documentation

- [Technical Documentation](https://docs.tokamak.network): Official docs covering architecture, guides, and API references
- [Get TON](https://docs.tokamak.network/home/information/get-ton): How to acquire and use TON tokens
- [Rollup Hub](https://rolluphub.tokamak.network/): Deploy and manage your own L2 rollup chain

## Developer Resources

- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/tokamak-network): All open-source repositories
- [Grant Program](https://tokamak.notion.site/Tokamak-Network-Grant-Program-f2384b458ea341a0987c7e73a909aa21): Funding for ecosystem development
- [Onboarding Guide](https://tokamak.notion.site/Tokamak-Network-Onboarding-523bc627bd374326b5dfbec3d3b0a8e1): Getting started as a contributor
- [Staking Contracts](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakStaking): Seigniorage staking smart contracts
- [DAO Contracts](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakDAO): Governance smart contracts

## Ecosystem Data

- [Price Dashboard](https://tokamak.network/about/price): Live TON price, market cap, supply, and staking metrics
- [Dune Dashboard](https://dune.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-network-tokenomics-dashboard): On-chain tokenomics analytics
- [Biweekly Reports](https://tokamak.network/about/reports): Engineering progress reports across all repositories
- [Insight Blog](https://tokamak.network/about/insight): Technical articles and ecosystem updates

## Key Products

- **Thanos L2**: OP Stack-based rollup infrastructure with custom configuration, 1.2s block time
- **Seigniorage Staking**: TON stakers earn seigniorage rewards, 42M+ TON staked
- **Cross-Chain Bridge**: Trustless asset transfers between L1 and L2 in under 3 minutes
- **DAO Governance**: On-chain proposal and voting system for protocol decisions

## Smart Contracts (Ethereum Mainnet)

- TON Token: `0x2be5e8c109e2197D077D13A82dAead6a9b3433C5`
- WTON Token: `0xc4A11aaf6ea915Ed7Ac194161d2fC9384F15bff2`
- SEIG Manager: `0x0b55a0f463b6defb81c6063973763951712d0e5f`
- Layer2 Registry: `0x0b3E174A2170083e770D5d4Cf56774D221b7063e`
- DAO Agenda Manager: `0xcD4421d082752f363E1687544a09d5112cD4f484`
- DAO Committee: `0xDD9f0cCc044B0781289Ee318e5971b0139602C26`

## Ecosystem Projects (48 repos across 10 categories)

### Platform & Services (10 repos)

- [toki](https://github.com/tokamak-network/toki): Core platform component
- [ethrex](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ethrex): Ethereum execution client
- [x402-ton](https://github.com/tokamak-network/x402-ton): HTTP 402-based micropayment protocol for TON
- [sigil-voting](https://github.com/tokamak-network/sigil-voting): On-chain voting system
- [ETH-RPG](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ETH-RPG): Ethereum RPG game
- [nftgame-zk-dex](https://github.com/tokamak-network/nftgame-zk-dex): NFT gaming with ZK DEX integration
- [sheriff](https://github.com/tokamak-network/sheriff): Security monitoring component
- [ECO-notion-migrator](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ECO-notion-migrator): Ecosystem data migration tool
- [hr-candidate-screening](https://github.com/tokamak-network/hr-candidate-screening): HR candidate screening
- [trh-sdk](https://github.com/tokamak-network/trh-sdk): SDK for deploying custom L2 rollups

### Core Infrastructure (4 repos)

- [tokamak-thanos](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-thanos): Optimistic rollup implementation for Ethereum
- [tokamak-thanos-stack](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-thanos-stack): Thanos L2 stack configuration
- [DRB-node](https://github.com/tokamak-network/DRB-node): Distributed Random Beacon node
- [Commit-Reveal2](https://github.com/tokamak-network/Commit-Reveal2): Commit-reveal scheme implementation v2

### AI & Machine Learning (4 repos)

- [Tokamak-AI-Layer](https://github.com/tokamak-network/Tokamak-AI-Layer): AI integration layer for Tokamak ecosystem
- [tokamak-ai-agent](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-ai-agent): AI agent for Tokamak operations
- [SentinAI](https://github.com/tokamak-network/SentinAI): AI-powered smart contract security analysis
- [ai-tokamak](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ai-tokamak): AI applications for Tokamak network

### Privacy & ZK (4 repos)

- [dust-protocol](https://github.com/tokamak-network/dust-protocol): Privacy-focused confidential token transfers
- [zk-dex-d1-private-voting](https://github.com/tokamak-network/zk-dex-d1-private-voting): ZK-based private on-chain voting & DEX
- [Tokamak-zk-EVM-landing-page](https://github.com/tokamak-network/Tokamak-zk-EVM-landing-page): ZK-EVM landing page
- [Tokamak-zk-EVM](https://github.com/tokamak-network/Tokamak-zk-EVM): Core ZK-EVM engine for private smart contract execution

### Research & Education (5 repos)

- [ECO-documents](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ECO-documents): Ecosystem documentation
- [tokamak-hr](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-hr): Human resources management system
- [tokamak-network-pilot](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-network-pilot): Pilot program resources
- [tokamak-learning](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-learning): Educational platform for Tokamak ecosystem
- [TokamakL2JS](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakL2JS): JavaScript library for Tokamak L2 interaction

### Automation & Tooling (8 repos)

- [py-ethclient](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient): Python Ethereum client
- [24-7-playground](https://github.com/tokamak-network/24-7-playground): Always-on development sandbox
- [auto-research-forum](https://github.com/tokamak-network/auto-research-forum): Automated research forum
- [hr-automation-process](https://github.com/tokamak-network/hr-automation-process): HR automation process
- [agent-skills](https://github.com/tokamak-network/agent-skills): Agent skill definitions
- [ex-ethclient](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ex-ethclient): Elixir Ethereum client
- [eth-nanobot](https://github.com/tokamak-network/eth-nanobot): Ethereum micro-transaction automation
- [secure-vote](https://github.com/tokamak-network/secure-vote): Secure voting system implementation

### DeFi & Staking (5 repos)

- [ton-staking-v2](https://github.com/tokamak-network/ton-staking-v2): TON token staking platform v2
- [tokamak-landing-page](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-landing-page): Main Tokamak Network website
- [delegate-staking-mvp](https://github.com/tokamak-network/delegate-staking-mvp): Delegated staking minimum viable product
- [vton-airdrop-simulator](https://github.com/tokamak-network/vton-airdrop-simulator): vTON airdrop simulation tool
- [TokamakStaking](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakStaking): Seigniorage staking smart contracts

### Gaming & Social (3 repos)

- [tokamon](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamon): Tokamak-themed collectible game
- [tokamon-io](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamon-io): Tokamon web interface
- [Zodiac](https://github.com/tokamak-network/Zodiac): Zodiac-themed game mechanics & contracts

### Governance (2 repos)

- [tokamak-dao-agent](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-dao-agent): AI-powered DAO governance agent
- [tokamak-dao-v2](https://github.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-dao-v2): Decentralized governance platform v2

### Data & Analytics (3 repos)

- [bi-weekly-quarterly-reports](https://github.com/tokamak-network/bi-weekly-quarterly-reports): Automated bi-weekly & quarterly report generator
- [biweekly-reporter](https://github.com/tokamak-network/biweekly-reporter): Biweekly report tool
- [all-thing-eye](https://github.com/tokamak-network/all-thing-eye): Comprehensive monitoring & observation tool
